title: monticalia tolimensis var. tolimensis
intro: Monticalia tolimensis var. tolimensis, also known as the Tolima monticalia, is a plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in the Andean region. It possesses medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Monticalia tolimensis var. tolimensis include teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of digestive issues, fever, and other ailments.
